format.raw: PIX-$SEVERITY-106100 access-list aclout $ACTION tcp outside$SRC_IP$SRC_PORT - inside$DST_IP$DST_PORT hit-cnt 1 600-second interval 0x63177dfd, 0x0

xml.raw:
<Policy>
  <Parser parser_key="{@parser_key}" type="2" regex="PIX-(\d)-(\d+)\s+(\w+)\s+(\w+)\s+\S+([0-9]{1,3}(?:\.[0-9]{1,3}){3})(\d{1,5})\s+-\s+\S+([0-9]{1,3}(?:\.[0-9]{1,3}){3})(\d{1,5}).*" arr_length="8">
    <Field position="0" name="severity" />
    <Field position="1" name="syslog_code" />
    <Field position="2" name="action" convert_tag="[[@toLowerCase()]]" />
    <Field position="3" name="prtc" convert_tag="[[@toLowerCase()]]" />
    <Field position="4" name="src_ip" />
    <Field position="5" name="src_port" />
    <Field position="6" name="dstn_ip" />
    <Field position="7" name="dstn_port" />
    <Field position="8" name="original_log" convert_tag="[[@originalLog()]]" />
    <Field position="9" name="vendor" convert_tag="[[@set('cisco')]]" />
    <Field position="10" name="model" convert_tag="[[@set('asaseries')]]" />
    <Field position="11" name="logtype" convert_tag="[[@set('threat')]]" />
    <Field position="12" name="parser_version" convert_tag="[[@set('v2')]]" />
    <Field position="13" name="parser_info" convert_tag="[[@set('[Cisco]_asaseries_security_v2_syslog')]]" />
    <Field position="14" name="eqp_type" convert_tag="[[@set('fw')]]" />
  </Parser>
</Policy>
